description: Implement incremental scanning with file-watcher for large monorepos. Currently full re-scan is expensive. Use existing file hash infrastructure to only re-scan changed files. Enable real-time IDE integration. Target: IMP-CORE-057.
goal: Reduce scan time for large codebases by only scanning changed files using hash-based caching
requirements: Use file hash cache (SHA-256) to detect changes
Modify scanner.ts to accept incremental mode

success_criteria.performance: 10x faster for projects with no changes
